evidence: Vitest execution-log.test.ts — 22/22 tests pass
Test: 'exportRunLog returns run-scoped agent_log.json envelope with run metadata' — verifies run_id, agent_id, company_id, status, started_at, entries array
Test: 'exportRunLog includes summary and token usage in envelope' — verifies usage.total_input_tokens, total_output_tokens, total_cost_usd
Test: 'entries map back to persisted log rows via log_id' — each entry has log_id linking to agent_execution_logs row
Test: 'exportRunLog throws when run is not found' — error handling for missing runs
Code: exportRunLog in execution-log.ts fetches run metadata + execution logs, builds Protocol Labs agent_log.json envelope with RunLogExport type
Vitest autonomous-loop.test.ts — 43/43 tests pass
Test: 'implements 5-step cycle: discover, plan, execute, verify, submit' — verifies all 5 steps execute in order and succeed
Test: 'creates execution log entries with appropriate log_type for each step' — verifies decision, tool_call, output, safety_check log types
Test: 'returns structured LoopResult with runStatus' — verifies runId, agentId, task, steps, success, totalTokensUsed, totalCostUsd, runStatus fields
Vitest autonomous-loop.test.ts — 'runAutonomousLoop — activity events' suite: 3/3 tests pass
Vitest autonomous-loop.test.ts — 'runAutonomousLoop — shared ID coherence' suite: 1/1 test passes
Test: 'creates run_started and run_completed activity events on success' — verifies matching agent_id and company_id
Test: 'creates approval_required activity event when authority is approval' — verifies approval-required paths create approval evidence
Test: 'run, activity events, and execution logs all share the same company, agent, and issue IDs' — verifies coherent trail
Vitest autonomous-loop.test.ts — 'runAutonomousLoop — issue linkage' suite: 5/5 tests pass
Vitest autonomous-loop.test.ts — 'runAutonomousLoop — approval lifecycle' suite: 6/6 tests pass
Test: 'links the run to the issue via issue_id when provided' — verifies run insert includes issue_id
Test: 'updates issue status to in_progress at start and done on completion' — verifies explicit status transitions
Test: 'creates approval record when authority policy is approval' — verifies approval creation with issue_id
Test: 'sets issue status to in_review when approval is required' — verifies approval-required pauses
Test: 'sets run status to approval_pending with null finished_at' — verifies pause behavior
Vitest budget-guardrails.test.ts — 21/21 tests pass
Test: 'rejects over-budget actions with human-readable reason and budget_exceeded ruleKind' — verifies pre-action rejection
Test: 'rejects unsafe operations with human-readable reason and unsafe_operation ruleKind' — verifies all 5 unsafe ops blocked
Test: 'rejects transactions to non-whitelisted recipients' — verifies recipient_blocked
Test: 'stops the loop with guardrail_rejected when budget is exceeded' — verifies loop integration stops before side effects
Test: 'does not execute any step side effects when guardrail rejects' — verifies no side effects occur
Test: 'records human-readable guardrail reason in the failed step error' — verifies structured logging
Test: 'logs guardrail check result to agent_execution_logs as safety_check' — verifies execution log entry
